data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for reward types: credit, discount, free service, and cash. However, the evidence provided in the linked use case only mentions a $25 account credit and a 20% first-visit discount, which does not cover all the required reward types. There is no mention of free service or cash rewards, indicating a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Missing evidence of free service and cash rewards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
